machine.name: Community Services Courts Diversion And Victim Services Pre Arrest Diversion Router
machine.description: Community-services machine for pre arrest diversion router in the courts diversion and victim services workstream. It monitors eligible offense, behavioral need, victim impact, and service slot availability and emits AI-triggered actions for health and human services, law enforcement/public safety coordination, homelessness response, and city operations.

metadata.domain: Community Services - Courts Diversion And Victim Services
metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: eligible offense, behavioral need, victim impact, and service slot availability
metadata.upstreamMachine: Community Services Law Enforcement And Public Safety Public Safety Executive
downstreamMachines: Community Services Courts Diversion And Victim Services Citation Court Reminder
agentActions: Dispatch victim_services_agent for urgent community-services intervention on pre arrest diversion router.
Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for pre arrest diversion router.
Create field work order or mobile team task for pre arrest diversion router.
Maintain monitored service path for pre arrest diversion router.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map 311, case-management, CAD/RMS, shelter HMIS, benefit enrollment, outreach, public health, and transit-access signals into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to case workers, mobile crisis, public safety, housing navigators, field crews, transportation dispatch, or health-service agents.
metadata.downstreamPattern: Output region [1160:1164] feeds Community Services Courts Diversion And Victim Services Citation Court Reminder.

sequences.name: Pre Arrest Diversion Router: WATCH -> URGENT_RESPONSE
